---
title: "Cats"
page-layout: full
repo-actions: false
lightbox:
  match: auto
  loop: true
---

Penelope, Peanut, Kingsley, Princeton, Patches, Petunia, Georgie, Sweetheart, Mango, Sherlock

:::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-4}
![Penelope, Peanut](https://i.imgur.com/IpeUV1B.jpg){group="cats"}

![Peanut](https://s3.amazonaws.com/andrewzah.com/cats/IMG_3480.jpg){group="cats"}

![Kingsley](https://s3.amazonaws.com/andrewzah.com/cats/IMG_3121.jpg){group="cats"}

![Patches](https://s3.amazonaws.com/andrewzah.com/cats/IMG_8493.jpg)
:::

::: {.g-col-8}
![Penelope, Peanut](https://s3.amazonaws.com/andrewzah.com/cats/IMG_3006.jpg){group="cats"}

![Kingsley](https://s3.amazonaws.com/andrewzah.com/cats/IMG_3649.jpg){group="cats"}

![Kingsley](https://s3.amazonaws.com/andrewzah.com/cats/IMG_3334.jpg){group="cats"}

![Kingsley & Princeton](https://s3.amazonaws.com/andrewzah.com/cats/IMG_3641.jpg)
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
:::
::::
